itinerary.title: Paris & Swiss Family Tour
itinerary.overview:
Paris • Eiffel Tower • Lucerne • Mt. Titlis • Interlaken 07 Nights / 08 Days Classic Paris & Swiss Family Vacation SERIAL CODE: FR-004 TRAGUIN TOUR CODE: TRG-PAR-SWI-2026 DESTINATIONS: Paris, France • Lucerne/Interlaken, Switzerland CATEGORY: Best Family Tour Package DURATION: 07 Nights / 08 Days Paris (3N) • Switzerland (4N)

TOUR OVERVIEW
Discover the dazzling charm of Paris and the breathtaking alpine beauty of Switzerland with this TRAGUIN curated family itinerary. Designed for excitement and comfort, this Paris-Swiss Combo package offers a flawless blend of monumental exploration and scenic mountain adventure. Experience the best of European hospitality with TRAGUIN's handpicked hotels and exclusive services, creating unforgettable memories.

WHY CHOOSE OUR PARIS & SWISS FAMILY TOUR?
Paris and Switzerland are world-class playgrounds for families, offering endless excitement for all ages. From the towering Eiffel Tower to the snow-capped peaks of Mt. Titlis, our curated experiences promise a premium European experience. With TRAGUIN, you get professional support and exclusive experiences that redefine the family holiday. THE IMMERSIVE DAY-WISE ITINERARY
itinerary.seo_title: FR-004 | Paris & Swiss Family Tour | TRAGUIN
itinerary.seo_description: Premium 07 Nights / 08 Days France package (FR-004 / TRG-PAR-SWI-2026): Paris, France • Lucerne/Interlaken, Switzerland.

highlights.text: Day 07: RETURN TO PARIS / DEPARTURE PREP

days.title: ARRIVAL IN PARIS
days.description: Arrive in elegant Paris. Your private TRAGUIN transfer will escort you to your handpicked hotel. Enjoy a relaxing evening overlooking the city.
activities: Full day as per curated TRAGUIN itinerary.

days.title: PARIS LANDMARKS
days.description: Explore the iconic Eiffel Tower and take a scenic Seine River cruise. Witness the iconic attractions that define luxury Paris sightseeing.
activities: Full day as per curated TRAGUIN itinerary.

days.title: PARIS TO SWITZERLAND
days.description: High-speed train journey to Switzerland. Arrive in the scenic city of Lucerne, renowned for its lake and mountain views.
activities: Full day as per curated TRAGUIN itinerary.

days.title: MT. TITLIS ADVENTURE
days.description: Experience the snow-capped majesty of Mt. Titlis with a cable car ride—a premium Swiss experience for the whole family.
activities: Full day as per curated TRAGUIN itinerary.

days.title: INTERLAKEN SCENERY
days.description: Explore the charming town of Interlaken, nestled between two stunning lakes, offering endless breathtaking landscapes.
activities: Full day as per curated TRAGUIN itinerary.

days.title: SWISS MOUNTAIN LEISURE
days.description: Enjoy a leisurely day exploring Swiss villages and local chocolate factories, creating unforgettable memories.
activities: Full day as per curated TRAGUIN itinerary.

days.title: RETURN TO PARIS / DEPARTURE PREP
days.description: Travel back to Paris for final shopping and leisure time before your premium experience concludes.
activities: Full day as per curated TRAGUIN itinerary.

days.title: DEPARTURE
days.description: Final luxury breakfast before your private TRAGUIN transfer to the airport.
activities: Full day as per curated TRAGUIN itinerary.

inclusions.text: 07 Nights in handpicked premium hotels across Paris, France • Lucerne/Interlaken, Switzerland
Private executive chauffeur-driven luxury ground transfers throughout
Private guided Paris sightseeing including Eiffel Tower, Louvre, and Versailles
High-speed rail and alpine experiences in Switzerland
International airfare and France/Schengen entry visa processing fees
Personal expenses, laundry, room service, and mini-bar charges
Optional sightseeing excursions not specified in the itinerary
Tipping, porterage fees, and travel insurance
